MMA
02  ·  What We Teach
Programs &
Disciplines
◆ ᚺᚢᚾᛏ ◆
Five elite combat arts. Three program levels. The same relentless standard applied to every one. Whether you've never thrown a punch or you're preparing to compete — your place is here.
01
Brazilian Jiu-Jitsu
Grappling · Ground Control · Submissions
The art of leverage and positional dominance. BJJ teaches you to neutralise and submit an opponent through technique alone — regardless of their size or strength. The intellectual backbone of MMA.
→
02
Muay Thai
Eight Limbs · Clinch · Stand-Up
The art of eight limbs — punches, elbows, knees, and kicks used in devastating combination with clinch control. The world's most complete stand-up striking system and a cornerstone of professional MMA.
→
03
Boxing
Precision · Footwork · Defence
The sweet science. Refined punching combinations, elite footwork, and defensive head movement. Boxing sharpens every other striking discipline and builds the kind of precision that wins fights.
→
04
Wrestling
Takedowns · Clinch · Control
Control who stands and who hits the ground. Freestyle takedowns, Greco-Roman clinch, and mat pressure — wrestling is the single most decisive skill set in modern MMA competition.
→
05
Mixed Martial Arts
Full Integration · Competition Preparation
The complete system. MMA at Red Crown is not a standalone discipline — it is the cohesive result of mastering all four arts above. Competition-ready training for athletes who are prepared to test everything.
→
Action Photo
BJJ rolling — mat-level angle, guard passing or submission attempt
Action Photo
Muay Thai pad work — close-action, knee or elbow combination, high energy
Action Photo

Classified — Fight Team
Red
Crown
Fight Team
You found us. Now prove you belong here.
Scroll to learn more
What Is The
Fight Team?
The Red Crown Fight Team is the competitive arm of the Academy. It is not a marketing tool — it is where serious athletes go to test everything they have built on the mat.

We compete at inter-academy tournaments and regional MMA events, representing Red Crown with the same discipline and precision demanded in training every single day.
  • Dedicated fight team sessions separate from the general program
  • Structured pre-fight training camps with periodised preparation
  • Full corner support from Red Crown coaches on competition day
  • Video analysis of rounds and competition footage
  • Inter-academy tournament and regional MMA event representation
  • Official Red Crown Academy competition kit — mandatory
How Do You
Qualify?
The Fight Team is earned. There is no shortcut, no fast track, and no exceptions. If you are ready to represent Red Crown, your coach will tell you — and so will the mat.
  • Minimum 12 months of active Red Crown membership
  • Consistent training — minimum [X] sessions per week, sustained
  • Coach recommendation following technical and character assessment
  • Demonstrated coachability, discipline, and conduct on the mat
  • No outstanding Code of Conduct violations
Express Intent
Ready to Compete?
Speak to your coach, or message us on WhatsApp. Tell us you want to compete. We will assess where you are and build a timeline together.
Contact the Academy →

TRYOUTS
04 · Compete
Join the
Hunt
Red Crown eSports selects players who combine elite mechanical skill with the same discipline and mental fortitude we demand on the mat. Think you qualify?
What We Look For
  • Top [X]% rank in your primary game — verified account required
  • Consistent competitive history — tournament or ranked match record
  • Availability for [X] practice sessions per week and all scheduled matches
  • Team-first mentality — coachability, communication, and composure under pressure
  • Alignment with Red Crown values: discipline, respect, relentless improvement
  • Noida / NCR region preferred for in-person sessions — remote considered case by case
